svg.text: Fig.2 After — chat lifecycle with Conversation aggregate
INBOUND → COMMANDER → CONVERSATION (NEW) → DISPATCH → PROVIDER → EVENT LOG → HEARTBEAT → MEMORY → INDEX

g.text: all under SAME commander dir → one LanceDB index
commander rollup = derived sum at read time
ONE per commander · shared by all conversations
written by tools/skills (saveFacts, append) — same path

svg.text: ✓ Fix: N surfaces, N conversations, ONE commander, ONE memory dir
ONE brain, shared by all four conversations
· Discord, UI, CLI all read the same MEMORY.md
· Quest claimed in UI visible from CLI
· Cost meter sums across all conversations
Storage layer summary · what changes vs what stays
★ NEW: StreamSession.conversationId field linking runtime to conversation
· UNCHANGED: Provider JSONL paths, Hammurabi event log paths, MEMORY.md, working-memory, LanceDB index path
· MOVED (CommanderSession → Conversation): pid, lastHeartbeat, currentTask, claudeSessionId / codexThreadId / geminiSessionId, channelMeta, completedTasks, totalCostUsd
Refs: store.ts:78–105 (Commander identity), conversation-store.ts (NEW), agents/types.ts:201–273 (StreamSession + conversationId),
register-channels.ts (rewritten to upsert at conversation tier), persistence.ts:109–173 (transcript paths unchanged),
